text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indignation pulses through me in this moment. Do
you know why?
choice_data_list: Because you didn't get first place again?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No... My heart aches because I was not my
perfect self!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The summit is, naturally, a position meant for the
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Overlord is the star who shines supreme in
every circumstance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But that was not me this day!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Did my beauty come across on the track? Did I
inspire the masses?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! I should have shined brighter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, how can my unsatisfactory running ever
ensnare the hearts of the crowd?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, how can my unsatisfactory running ever
ensnare the hearts of the crowd?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Of course. I am aware of this.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Only a fool would be so hideous to rush for
success.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes... Now is still the time to endure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Train diligently, build experience, and keep our
sights on the ultimate goal...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Exactly, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Buds exposed to the harshest rains produce
greater flowers when their time to blossom comes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I look forward to that moment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O's eyes are beaming with
motivation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Naturally! I refuse to allow things to end this way!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I swear here and now that with an unforgettable
performance, I will ignite thunderous applause in
the next event!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she puts the palm of her hand to her
lips.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I tire of vowing with kisses that taste of dirt.
Kisses ought to be pleasant and sweet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wait for me, o goddess of victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This Overlord shall run so elegantly that even you will feel impelled to bend the knee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I train with greater vigor the
next day.
